headline: Marc Guéhi
body: Heat is on… preparations intensify to face Norway in Miami. Marc Guéhi, Reece James and Declan Rice aren’t out on the pitch at Swope Soccer Village this morning as they work on individual programmes elsewhere. Jordan Henderson remains back at the team hotel after surgery Video
raw_text:
Heat is on… preparations intensify to face Norway in Miami. Marc Guéhi, Reece James and Declan Rice aren’t out on the pitch at Swope Soccer Village this morning as they work on individual programmes elsewhere. Jordan Henderson remains back at the team hotel after surgery

Video
